race.comment: VIVALDA (14) was sharply better second-up, beaten 1.5L over 1200m at Scarpside. Has more to give and just missed here only third-up outing. Has the inside gate and gives every indication that the 1400m will suit. GOLDEN CHATTER (6) raced forward and held on beaten 1.4L over 1200m at Pinjarra. Maps well and won't have to improve much to threaten. YANKEE ACE (4) found more like his best, missing by a half-length over this trip at Scarpside. Settled back, and there was a lot of merit in the effort. A winning chance holding that form. INVASORE (3) has another wide gate to contend with, but his efforts at Ascot three back and York after that would have him in the reckoning.
